nasb.text: Now the Philistines gathered together all their armies to Aphek, while the Israelites were camping by the spring which is in Jezreel.

esv.text: Now the Philistines had gathered all their forces at Aphek. And the Israelites were encamped by the spring that is in Jezreel.

cnv.text: 非利士人把他們所有的軍隊都聚集在亞弗，以色列人卻在耶斯列的泉旁安營。

ccb.text: 非利士人把全部军队聚集在亚弗，以色列军则在耶斯列水泉旁扎营。
